scripts.docker:deploy: docker compose -f docker-compose.deploy.yml run --build --rm auth && docker compose -f docker-compose.deploy.yml run --build --rm deploy
scripts.db:seed:local: pnpm db:seed:generate && pnpx wrangler d1 execute grand-cp-db --local --file=./scripts/seed.sql
scripts.db:seed:remote: pnpm db:seed:generate && pnpx wrangler d1 execute grand-cp-db --remote --file=./scripts/seed.sql
scripts.db:reset:local: pnpx wrangler d1 execute grand-cp-db --local --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS verifications; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS accounts; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS status_history; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_problems; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_favorites; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS problems; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS phases; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users;" && pnpx wrangler d1 execute grand-cp-db --local --file=./drizzle/0000_public_surge.sql && pnpm db:seed:local
scripts.db:reset:remote: pnpx wrangler d1 execute grand-cp-db --remote --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS verifications; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS accounts; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS status_history; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_problems; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS user_favorites; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS problems; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS phases; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users;" && pnpx wrangler d1 execute grand-cp-db --remote --file=./drizzle/0000_public_surge.sql && pnpm db:seed:remote
